description: Redfin is a real estate brokerage and property search platform for buying, selling, renting, and market research. Its website also publishes housing market data and downloadable listing data for some MLS regions.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on redfin.com beyond consumer website endpoints and downloadable website data; no official Redfin API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was documented on the domain.
